name: Master Tao the Chanter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> タオ
desc: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 Illusion monster in your GY, except "Master Tao the Chanter"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the GY for the rest of this turn, except Illusion monsters. You can only use this effect of "Master Tao the Chanter" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 Illusion monster in your GY, except "Master Tao the Chanter"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the GY for the rest of this turn, except Illusion monsters. You can only use this effect of "Master Tao the Chanter" once per turn.
eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 Illusion monster in your GY, except "Master Tao the Chanter"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the GY for the rest of this turn, except Illusion monsters. You can only use this effect of "Master Tao the Chanter" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
